name_en: .💖[Full set of original green packaging]💞Small GG shoulder bag. The GG pattern is reinterpreted every season, accumulating decades of rich heritage. This symbol not only represents the initials of the brand's founder but also subtly pays tribute to the Gucci houndstooth pattern originating from the 1930s. By merging different eras of Gucci's history, this pattern honors the brand's origins while innovating. This black small shoulder bag features an interlocking letter pattern. Hidden Details · Black embossed GG leather · Gold-tone hardware · As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology to help verify authenticity and enjoy a digital innovation experience. Cotton-linen lining · Inside: 1 zip pocket · Handle height: 15cm · Detachable shoulder strap (30cm high) · Double G and rivet lock · Weight: approx. 0.6kg.
